data.name: HENTAI WITCH ACADEMY 2
data.detailed_description:
HENTAI WITCH ACADEMY 2.

It is the continuation of the saga of this hentai game, in which you play the role of a student at a prestigious school for witches.

Where you meet different girls and have sex with them.

It picks up the story at the end of the first story, with new dynamics and new girls.

This time a simple fighting system has been added where you will challenge various monster girls, defeat them and have sex with them.

Unlock all the porn scenes that this game has in store for you.

data.short_description: Hentai Witch Academy 2 is the second part of an adventure-style visual novel with different lesbian and non-lesbian girls that you have to fuck.
data.supported_languages: 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 MB 可用空間

  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
